title: ServerPackUnlockerPlus
description: Gives Server Resource Packs vanilla behavior
body:
Original Pack has implemented the features in this fork so you are welcome to download the original

Gives Server Resource Packs Vanilla Behavior

By default in Minecraft, Server Resource Packs are pinned and force enabled, With this mod, Server Resource Packs can be moved in resource pack screen just like regular resource packs, they can be moved up and down, disabled, enabled or edited (even if the server uses sha1 check). Resource packs position is saved for each Server individually to a file, so everytime you load into a server, the resource pack is loaded from the last saved position.
Requires Fabric API
Forked from https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker
Original mod only allows you to move the resource pack up and down, and after logging off, the resource pack returns to the top. This fork adds the ability to enable/disable it, and it also saves the position after logging out or quitting the game, so when you return its in the same position as you last saved it at.
